---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new scenario, adapter, or repo improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem Statement

What gap are you trying to close?

## Proposed Change

Describe the desired behavior.

## Why It Belongs In The Public Repo

Explain why this belongs on the public/community surface instead of a private or
commercial layer.

## Acceptance Notes

- What should be tested?
- What docs should change?
- What evidence or limitations should be stated?
